title: MoreBlocksMod
description: Add some more blocks and biomes to your world!
body:
# MoreBlocksMod
This mod adds **more** **_blocks_** and **_biomes_**

<big>**Are you bored of minecraft?**</big> \
Or do you just want a new content?
Well,

<big>**THIS** MOD IS FOR **YOU**!!</big> \
**_YAY!_**

## This mod adds:
- Blueberry biome and blocks
- Purplit biome and blocks
- Matcha biome and blocks
- More mosaic
- A wall block

And there will be more later!

### Made for **Chactix**.
